description: These numero uno sneakers with sturdy soles, bold overlays and aggressive design highlights is a closet essential. Class up your off-duty ensemble with this sleek referenced sneaker. Wear it with fitted denims and a T-shirt. Throw on a tonal jacket for added style. Upper Textured synthetic leather upper for durability, comfort and style Stitched nubuck overlays for midfoot support Perforations on the midfoot Lace-up system for snug, customised Fit Synthetic leather tongue for midfoot comfort Printed branding on tongue for style Midsole Rubber midsole for lightweight, cushioned comfort Outsole Durable TPU outsole with terraced grooves and an upraised heel shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Avoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in direct sunlight
